feed.title: The Stu
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: New VM?
entry.summary: What could you possibly do with a new Ubuntu 22 VM???? Get Docker Here is an easy way to get docker up and running. You can even put this in a script. #!/bin/bash # https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/ubuntu/#install-using-the-convenience-script ROOTLESS_USER=sean echo '---Installing docker---' curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com -o get-docker.sh sudo sh get-docker.sh rm get-docker.sh ech...

entry.title: Nvidia Patch
entry.summary: Instructions on how to bypass the transcoding limit on Nvidia graphics cards using nvidia-patch Install Latest NVIDIA Driver Download and install the latest nvidia driver from the table on that one github page VER=XXX sudo apt update sudo apt install --no-install-recommends nvidia-cuda-toolkit nvidia-headless-${VER} nvidia-utils-${VER} libnvidia-encode-${VER} sudo reboot After a reboot...

entry.title: Server Specs
entry.summary: Reboot time: 60 seconds +/- 10 seconds CPU: Ryzen 5 3600X Mobo: ASUS TUF B450 Gaming RAM: 2x8GB XPG Gammix D10 + 2x8GB Crucial Ballistix Graphics: MSI GeForce GTX 1060 3GB OCV1 Storage: 250GB WD Blue M.2 SSD 3x8TB Shucked WD Elements 3x14TB Shucked WD Elements 2x4TB Toshiba MG04ACA SATA Controller: SHINESTAR SATA Controller Card 6 Ports Case: Fractal Design Node 804 OS: Proxm...
